extension.summary: Set up a kid-friendly Kodi profile and parent-managed Real-Debrid connection.
extension.description: Installs official kid-safe add-ons, creates family shortcuts, guides Kodi profile locking, and connects Real-Debrid with the official device authorization flow. No third-party piracy repositories or shared credentials are included.

extension.summary: Kid-friendly Kodi setup tools for SoLoKodi.
extension.description: A family-focused Kodi repository with a setup wizard, official kid-safe add-on shortcuts, profile lock guidance, and parent-managed Real-Debrid authorization for lawful personal media workflows.
